PLANS & PRICING

Bespoke Services Configured For Your Budget

Choose full-service blueprints, day-of management, or elopement coordination. John adjusts every structure to protect your budget limit.

Most Popular

Full-Service Planning

Complete wedding management from engagement to reception. Vendors, timeline, and every detail handled.

  • Budget creation and tracking
  • All vendor sourcing and negotiation
  • Contract review for every vendor
  • Day-of coordination included
Learn More

Day-of Coordination

John manages your wedding day from start to finish so you stay present and stress-free.

  • Pre-wedding planning call
  • Vendor confirmation calls
  • 15-minute interval timeline
  • Full day coverage (10 hrs)
Learn More

Partial Planning

You've started. Bring John in for specific tasks, vendor negotiations, or final-stretch help.

  • Up to 10 consultations
  • Vendor sourcing (5 categories)
  • Contract review included
  • Day-of coordination included
Learn More

Elopements

Intimate ceremonies under 30 guests, anywhere in Maryland. Permits, location, vendors all sorted.

  • Location scouting
  • Permit applications
  • Officiant coordination
  • Day-of presence
Learn More

John builds a tailored planning roadmap covering vendors, timeline, and budget milestones for your wedding.

Your Perfect Day

Relax and enjoy every moment. John handles the details so you and your partner can be fully present.

WHY CHOOSE JOHN

A Gorgeous Maryland Wedding Within Realistic Means

Based in Baltimore, John knows every venue, permit specialist, and highly discounted local vendor across the state. His process removes planning noise and guarantees real savings.

Budget Honesty

Every dollar justified before it's committed. No hidden fees, no vendor kickbacks.

Maryland Expertise

50+ weddings across Baltimore, Annapolis, the Eastern Shore, and Western Maryland.

Permit Specialists

Instant support filing county marriage licenses and state park pavilion permits.

Stress-Free Process

Over 50 successful ceremonies managed with absolute day-of peace of mind.

"Starting your married life with heavy financial debt is entirely optional. I build breathtaking celebrations without the premium inflation."

— John, Lead Planner

YOUR QUESTIONS ANSWERED

Common Questions About Maryland Budget Weddings

Everything you need to know about planning, permits, and coordinating your wedding.

How much does a wedding planner cost in Baltimore?
John's packages start at $500 for day-of coordination and go up to $2,800 for full-service planning. All packages are designed for Maryland weddings with budgets under $20,000. See full pricing here.
What areas of Maryland does John serve?
John serves all of Maryland: Baltimore, Annapolis, Columbia, Towson, Frederick, Rockville, Silver Spring, and the Eastern Shore.
What is the difference between full-service planning and day-of coordination?
Full-service planning covers everything from engagement to reception over 6-18 months. Day-of coordination means John manages your wedding day timeline and vendors without prior planning involvement. Learn about day-of coordination.
Do you plan elopements in Maryland?
Yes. Elopements and micro-weddings (under 30 guests) are a specialty. John handles location scouting, permits, officiants, and vendor coordination. See elopement packages.
See All FAQs
